home.tagline: Where the French media industry meets
home.subtitle: Two professional days dedicated to the radio, podcast, video and digital media ecosystem.
home.reassureTitle: A platform built for media professionals
home.reassureBody: Quick double-opt-in registration, GDPR-compliant. Your data stays in France.

step1.heading: Registration — step 1 of 2
step1.subheading: Two minutes: we identify you, send a confirmation email, then we build your offer together.
step1.consentRgpd: I have read and accept the <link>privacy policy</link> and terms of use of MediaDays Solutions.
step1.consentMarketing: I agree to receive commercial communications from MediaDays Solutions and Editions HF (newsletter, events, offers). I can unsubscribe at any time.

tooltips.emailBody: Please use your work email address. Avoid personal Gmail, Hotmail or Yahoo addresses: we verify that your email is linked to your business activity to ensure quality registrations and prevent duplicates.
tooltips.categoryBody: Exhibitor: company offering audio, radio, podcast products/services (sales houses, service providers, studios, equipment manufacturers...) that wants a physical booth at Paris Radio Show 2026 on December 15, 2026 at Carrousel du Louvre. Partner: company wishing to support MediaDays Solutions 2026 (with or without physical presence). Several partnership levels available (main sponsor, pole sponsor, media partner).

checkEmail.heading: Check your inbox
checkEmail.body: We just sent you an email to confirm your address. Click the link in the email to move on to step 2.
checkEmail.spamHint: Don't forget to check your spam folder (and add philippe@mediadays.solutions to your contacts for future emails).
checkEmail.resendMaxed: Resend limit reached. Contact us if needed.

expired.heading: Link expired
expired.body: Your confirmation link has expired (24h validity). Please start the registration over.

alreadyConverted.heading: Registration already finalized
alreadyConverted.body: Your file is being processed by our team. We will get back to you within 48 business hours.

caseA.heading: Welcome {firstName}!
caseA.subheading: As a Paris Radio Show exhibitor, here is your dedicated offer:
caseA.salonParis: Paris Radio Show — December 15, 2026 (Carrousel du Louvre)
caseA.salonParisIncluded: Main show, included in the pack
caseA.salonMarseilleAdd: Add the Marseille day (+€{price} excl. VAT)
caseA.salonMarseilleUnavailable: Marseille unavailable for this pack — contact philippe@mediadays.solutions
caseA.boothPreferencesLegend: Pick your 3 preferred booths (look at the plan above)
caseA.boothPreferencesHelp: Final assignment will be confirmed by our team within 48h after payment. Booths are assigned in registration order.
caseA.boothPaceCanva: Browse the floor plan below, then pick your 3 preferred booths.
caseA.paymentDevisSepaDesc: Receive a Sellsy quote by email. Payment by wire upon receipt.
caseA.paymentDevisAcompteStripeDesc: Receive a quote + secure payment link for the deposit.
caseA.paymentProformaAcompteDesc: Receive a pro-forma invoice to be paid in full at deposit.
caseA.paymentFactureIntegraleDesc: Receive a final invoice to be paid in full.
caseA.summaryVatNote: VAT not applicable (reverse charge outside France).
caseA.cgvAccept: I have read and accept the <link>terms and conditions</link>.
caseA.summaryNoPack: Select a pack to see the total.

caseB.heading: Thank you for your interest, {firstName}!
caseB.subheading: Tell us about your project — our team will get back to you within 48 business hours.
caseB.messagePlaceholder: Describe in a few words your project, constraints, questions…

thankYou.heading: All set!
thankYou.bodyDevisSepa: Your registration has been received. You will receive your quote by email within 48 business hours.
thankYou.bodyStripePending: Your registration has been received. You will receive your secure payment link by email within 48 business hours.
thankYou.bodyCaseB: Your request has been received. Our team will get back to you within 48 business hours to discuss your project.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us.
errors.captcha: Anti-spam check failed. Please try again.
errors.emailUndeliverable: This email seems undeliverable. Please check your input or use another work email.
errors.emailDuplicateRecent: A registration is already in progress for this email. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
errors.emailDuplicateProspect: This email is already linked to an account. Please contact philippe@mediadays.solutions.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.consentRgpdRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.

styleguide.title: MD visual identity
styleguide.intro: Sanity check of MDS Prospection's colors, typography and shadcn component palette.
